workoutTitle: Welcome & How to Use This Plan
exerciseDetails: Welcome to your enhanced training plan! This program is built to be adaptable. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete, you'll find options to tailor the workouts to your specific needs. Read the following sections carefully before you begin.

programDescription: This 12-week plan is your complete roadmap to Hyrox. It's designed for the busy athlete who needs maximum results from a manageable 3 to 4-day per week schedule.
workoutTitle: Welcome & How to Use This Plan
exerciseDetails: RPE is a scale from 1-10 that measures how hard an exercise feels. RPE 1 is sitting on the couch; RPE 10 is an all-out, maximal effort. For beginners: RPE 7 should feel like a 7 out of 10 effort – you can still speak a few words, but you are definitely working hard. This allows you to train by feel, which is a crucial skill.

programDescription: This 12-week plan is your complete roadmap to Hyrox. It's designed for the busy athlete who needs maximum results from a manageable 3 to 4-day per week schedule.
workoutTitle: Welcome & How to Use This Plan
exerciseDetails: Nearly every workout has a 'Scaling Option' to make it more accessible, and an 'Advanced Challenge' to push the limits. Use them! There is no ego here. The goal is to complete the workout with good form and the right intensity for YOU.
